summary: Frontend-only testing of ISO tab UX update: card grid layout with album artwork and modal dialog. All features tested and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ISO tab now displays items in card grid layout (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) matching Collection tab
ISO item cards show: album artwork (or disc icon placeholder), album title, artist name, pressing notes variant pill (gold border), status badge (OPEN/FOUND)
Clicking ISO item opens modal dialog with full album details
Modal displays: album artwork, title, artist, year, pressing notes, condition preference, color variant, tags, budget range, status badge
Modal for own profile shows 'Mark as Found' (green) and 'Remove' (red outline) action buttons when status is OPEN
Modal includes Discogs link when discogs_id is available
Collection tab unchanged - still displays card grid with /record/{id} navigation
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing demo user ISO: Pink Floyd - Dark Side of the Moon
context_for_next_testing_agent: ISO tab UX update verified. ISO items display in card grid with artwork/placeholder, clicking opens modal. Demo user has 1 ISO (Pink Floyd - Dark Side of the Moon). katieintheafterglow has 138 collection items but no ISOs. Collection tab navigation to /record/{id} works correctly.

iso_card_grid_layout.details: ISO items render in responsive grid (2/3/4 columns), matching Collection tab layout

iso_card_components.details: Cards show album art (or Disc icon), title, artist, pressing notes pill, status badge (OPEN/FOUND)

iso_modal_opens.details: Clicking ISO card opens modal dialog with album details

iso_modal_content.details: Modal shows artwork, title, artist, year, pressing notes, condition_pref, tags, budget

iso_modal_own_profile_actions.details: Mark as Found and Remove buttons visible for own profile when status=OPEN

iso_modal_discogs_link.details: Discogs link not shown because test ISO has no discogs_id - code correctly handles null case

collection_tab_unchanged.details: Collection tab shows 138 items in grid, clicking navigates to /record/{id}

frontend_compiles.details: ESLint passes, webpack compiles with no errors (only deprecation warnings)
